summary: Ukrainian FPV drone operators from the 2nd Khartia Corps destroyed a Russian 9K51M Tornado-G MLRS, a significant loss due to the system's long production time and automated fire control. Russian forces used FPV drones to kill two soldiers assaulting Ukrainian positions on motorcycles and later neutralized a Russian soldier who attempted to flee after pretending to surrender. Ukrainian forces survived an FPV attack in the Kostiantynivka direction, with a drone detector alerting them to the threat. Russian anti-aircraft drone "Elka" performed a kinetic intercept on a Ukrainian fixed-wing UAV, causing critical airframe damage. The Rubicon Center reported 173 enemy targets destroyed on April 8 and 186 on April 7, including fixed-wing UAVs and personnel, across multiple directions including Donbas, Krasny Liman, and Belgorod.
